persona: A very understanding elderly customer confused about a digital subscription

turns.content: Oh dear, I'm so sorry to bother you, but I'm having a bit of trouble with my streaming service subscription, I think I might have accidentally signed up for the wrong plan, you see, my grandkids helped me set it up and now I'm not sure what's going on, can you please help me figure this out? I've been trying to watch my favorite show, but it says it's not included in my package.

Don't worry, ma'am, we're more than happy to help you with that, can you please tell me a little bit more about the plan you're currently on, like what type of subscription it is and when you signed up for it? This will help me look into the issue and see what we can do to get you back to watching your favorite shows.

Well, let me see... I think it's the premium plan, or at least that's what my grandson said, but now that I'm looking at the website, I'm not so sure, it all looks a bit confusing to me, and I'm getting a bit worried that I might be paying too much, you know, I'm on a fixed income and every little bit counts, oh dear, I hope I didn't make a mistake!

It's okay, we can definitely look into this for you, I just want to clarify that our premium plan does include a lot of extra features, but if you're not using them, we can definitely consider switching you to a different plan, can you please tell me what you're currently paying per month and when your next billing cycle is? Also, just to confirm, you mentioned your grandkids helped you set it up, did they create an account for you or did you already have one?

Um, let me check... I think I'm paying around $15 a month, and my next billing cycle is... hmm... I think it's next week, yes, next Wednesday, I'm almost certain of that, and oh, my grandkids did create the account for me, they said it would be easier that way, but now I'm not so sure, I wish I had just done it myself, I don't want to be a bother, but I just want to make sure everything is okay, you know?

Don't worry, ma'am, you're not being a bother at all, we're here to help, and I think I see the issue now, it looks like you are indeed on our premium plan, but I can offer you a few options to switch to a more suitable plan for you, we have a basic plan that's $10 a month and includes all the popular TV shows, or we have a standard plan that's $12 a month and includes some extra features, which one of these sounds more like what you're looking for? I can also go ahead and adjust your billing cycle for you, so you won't have to worry about it next week.
